summary: Matched the Fountain of Dreams stage module grIzumi by replacing asm/melee/gr/grizumi.s with a 903-line C implementation and wiring it into the build. The PR also made supporting header and type work: added grizumi.h, expanded Ground per-stage variable storage with an overlay union for Izumi variants, corrected ftDrawCommmon to ftDrawCommon, moved math.h out of broad headers into source files that need it, and added baselib/camera/library prototypes and accessors needed by the stage code. No review comments were present in the slice.
what_changed: Deleted the 1969-line asm implementation of grIzumi and added src/melee/gr/grizumi.c with matched C for stage initialization, callbacks, platform/fountain behavior, reflection/render callbacks, camera/snapshot use, and helper routines.
Added src/melee/gr/grizumi.h containing public prototypes for the grIzumi functions and stage entry points.
Updated obj_files.mk to build the C object instead of the old grIzumi asm object.
Added stage data and callbacks in C, including grIz_803E0D60, grIz_803E0D74, and grIz_803E0E5C for /GrIz.dat.
Expanded Ground variable modeling in src/melee/gr/types.h by replacing raw xC4/xC8/xCC/xD0 fields with a union GroundVars containing named overlays such as unk, izumi, izumi2, and izumi3.
Updated grbattle.c to access the previous raw Ground fields through gp->gv.unk.* after the Ground union change.
Renamed ftDrawCommmon symbols to ftDrawCommon across ftdrawcommon.c/.h and call sites visible in the diff.
Moved math.h inclusion out of shared headers such as ft/inlines.h, ft/types.h, it/types.h, baselib/mtx.h, and baselib/util.h, then added math.h directly to many C files that depend on it.
Refined cmsnap data typing from loose ints to HSD_ImageDesc and changed cmSnap_80031618 to return void* from cmsnap_data.unk1.img_ptr.

Added or corrected prototypes for camera, matrix, library, and baselib functions needed by grIzumi, including C_MTXLightPerspective, Camera_80031074, Camera_800310A0, Camera_8002A4AC, grAnime_801C8780, lb_800121FC/lb_800122C8 with HSD_ImageDesc*, and lb_80013B14 returning HSD_CObj*.
Added small baselib accessors/macros such as HSD_GObjGetClassifier, HSD_GObjGetNext, GET_COBJ, GET_LOBJ, HSD_JObjGetChild/GetNext/GetParent, and HSD_LObjGetNext.
Adjusted HSD_CObjDesc layout in cobj.h to model viewport and scissor as nested left/right/top/bottom fields rather than packed u32 fields.
smart_moves: Kept the grIzumi stage logic localized in a new C module but made only the supporting header/layout changes needed to compile and match it.
Modeled Ground stage-specific data as a union of named overlays instead of continuing to use raw xC4/xC8/xCC/xD0 fields, making future stage decomp easier while preserving offsets.
Moved math.h dependency pressure from central headers into individual C files, reducing transitive include pollution and making header dependencies less fragile.
Used typed HSD_ImageDesc plumbing for snapshot/reflection code instead of int* placeholders, which made grIzumi reflection texture code more meaningful.
Added inline getters for HSD object traversal to express assembly patterns like gobj->next, jobj->child, and lobj->next without spreading raw field access everywhere.
Preserved matching clues directly in the C via decomp.me scratch links and comments around awkward MUST_MATCH stack padding, inline-like regions, and OSReport line-number issues.
decomp_lessons: For stage modules, expect Ground user-data offsets after xC4 to be stage-specific; use a union overlay when multiple stages already rely on the same physical offsets.
When a broad header removal breaks users of math macros/functions, prefer adding math.h to the exact C files that use it rather than restoring it to common type headers.
Reflection/rendering stage code often needs better baselib typing first: HSD_CObj, HSD_ImageDesc, HSD_TObj, camera prototypes, and matrix/light-perspective declarations.
Decomping a stage may require non-stage cleanup across fighter, item, library, and baselib because previously misspelled or placeholder declarations hide required symbol names and types.
Small static inline accessors can be matching-friendly and improve readability when assembly repeatedly null-checks tree/list next pointers.

If matching depends on source line numbers for OSReport strings, do not blindly use #line; comments in this PR show it can interfere with compile errors and may need manual string/line constants instead.
Document unresolved matching oddities in-place, such as unused stack blocks under MUST_MATCH or suspicious casts like passing a Vec3 as S32Vec3 data, so future cleanup has context.
naming_conventions: Correct spelling is ftDrawCommon, not ftDrawCommmon; this PR renamed prototypes and call references accordingly.
Stage-specific Ground overlays were named by module/use: gv.izumi, gv.izumi2, gv.izumi3, while pre-existing generic users moved under gv.unk.
The grIzumi module retained address-based function names such as grIzumi_801CBE64 and data names such as grIz_803E0E5C, consistent with the project’s partially named decomp state.
Helper macros follow baselib object type naming: GET_JOBJ, GET_COBJ, GET_LOBJ, and GET_REFLECTION.
New typed descriptors use existing HSD naming, e.g. HSD_ImageDesc*, HSD_CObj*, HSD_TObj*, HSD_GObj*, HSD_JObj*, and HSD_LObj*.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Replaced asm/melee/gr/grizumi.s entirely with C and updated obj_files.mk so the matched C object is used.
Used MUST_MATCH-only unused stack byte arrays to reproduce stack layout in difficult grIzumi functions.
Introduced a small rand_inline helper to match repeated random-range assembly patterns in grIzumi_801CC358.
Used exact OSReport strings and manual line constants where #line was noted as problematic.
Represented bitfield flag writes through existing Ground flag fields such as stage_info.unk8C.b4/b5, gp->x11_flags.b012, and gp->x10_flags.b5/b3.
Added inlines for null-safe HSD_JObj and HSD_LObj traversal to match assembly that returns NULL when the object pointer is NULL.
Adjusted CObjDesc viewport/scissor field layout to expose halfword fields matching code that treats those descriptor portions as left/right/top/bottom values.
review_feedback: No issue comments, review comments, or reviews were present in the provided PR slice.
The PR body explicitly notes two intentions: removing math.h from most headers and renaming ftDrawCommmon to ftDrawCommon.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that rename grIzumi address-based functions to semantic Fountain of Dreams names.
Find follow-up changes to GroundVars_izumi or the Ground union size/comment asking how big it should be.
Search for later cleanup of the Vec3 to S32Vec3 cast in grIzumi_801CBE64.
Search for PRs that continue removing math.h from headers or normalize source-level math includes.
Search for later fixes to HSD_CObjDesc viewport/scissor layout or HSD_ImageDesc snapshot typing.
